_doc: Implementation backlog for the single sequential Ralph loop. SOURCE OF TRUTH for done/not-done + dependency order; docs/HARNESS.md §8.1 = schema. Each task's `do` + `done-when` live in a per-task Markdown spec at the `spec` path (.harness/tasks/TNNN.md, sections '## Do' / '## Done when'); every BUILDABLE task carries `facets` (difficulty auto-tuning) — a needs-human gated task is carved out and carries none. `gate` is `null` (buildable) or `needs-human` (a one-time human step). Grow the backlog with the /implementation-harness-add-to-backlog skill.

tasks.title: Xcode project scaffold + SwiftFormat/SwiftLint + CI green on an empty build
